item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 2min Going updates irishracing.com Going updates Following a dry and breezy morning at Bellewstown, the ground conditions have changed ahead of racing this afternoon. 42

item.title: SportingLife: Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 12min "He has joined a stable that does notably well with recruits from other yard
item.description:
Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 12min "He has joined a stable that does notably well with recruits from other yards, including first time up."
Check out the best bets from the @Timeform team ahead of Saturday's racing De sportinglife.com 1 292

item.title: JohnDugganSport: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 13min Not much better things in Irish life than reading top sports writers on the day the
item.description: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 13min Not much better things in Irish life than reading top sports writers on the day the Hurling Championship begins. We actually need more columnists, not less. I do radio and radio is very important. But so are newspapers. #buyanewspaper 1 8 448
